content: Detect a running macOS app from a shell/AppleScript installer via: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to count (every process whose name is "Adobe Photoshop 2025")' or pgrep -i photoshop / ps aux | grep -i photoshop. Process name varies by PS version (e.g. 'Adobe Photoshop 2025') so match should be a substring/wildcard, not an exact year-pinned string.
